lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad veechaareeai gun meh rahai samaae |
lines.english: Reflect on the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and immerse yourself in His Glorious Virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤੁਲੁ ਕਿਉ ਤੋਲੀਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਤੋਲੇ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: atul kiau toleeai vin tole paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: How can the unweighable be weighed? Without weighing Him, He cannot be obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee keemat naa pavai kahanaa kichhoo na jaae |
lines.english: His value cannot be estimated; nothing can be said about this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਆਪਿ ਤੋਲਸੀ ਆਪੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: apanaa aap aap tolasee aape milai milaae |
lines.english: He Himself weighs Himself; He unites in Union with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਚੀ ਬੂਝ ਦਿਤੀ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree gur aapane jin sachee boojh ditee bujhaae |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru; He has made me realize this true realization.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਤੁ ਮੁਸੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਲੁਟੀਐ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jagat musai amrit lutteeai manamukh boojh na paae |
lines.english: The world has been deceived, and the Ambrosial Nectar is being plundered. The self-willed manmukh does not realize this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਜਾਗੇ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਘਰੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਦੂਤਾ ਕਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਵਸਾਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: guramatee jaage tinaee ghar rakhiaa dootaa kaa kichh na vasaae |8|
lines.english: Those who follow the Guru's Teachings and remain awake and aware, preserve and protect the home of their heart; demons have no power against them. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲਸੀ ਜਾਸੀ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai naal na chalasee jaasee janam gavaae |
lines.english: Without the Name, nothing will go along with him; he wastes his life, and departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਨਾ ਬਿਲਲਾਇ ਨਾ ਤਰਸਾਇ ਏਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa naa bilalaae naa tarasaae ehu man khasam kaa hukam man |
lines.english: O rainbird, do not cry out. Do not let this mind of yours be so thirsty for a drop of water. Obey the Hukam, the Command of your Lord and Master,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਤਿਖ ਉਤਰੈ ਚੜੈ ਚਵਗਲਿ ਵੰਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam maniai tikh utarai charrai chavagal van |1|
lines.english: and your thirst shall be quenched. Your love for Him shall increase four-fold. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਵਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਜਲ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਫਿਰਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa jal meh teraa vaas hai jal hee maeh firaeh |
lines.english: O rainbird, your place is in the water; you move around in the water.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਥਲ ਚਹੁ ਦਿਸਿ ਵਰਸਦਾ ਖਾਲੀ ਕੋ ਥਾਉ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal chahu dis varasadaa khaalee ko thaau naeh |
lines.english: In the water and on the land, it rains down in the ten directions. No place is left dry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੀ ਤਾਂ ਤੂੰ ਕੂਕਣ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jal kee saar na jaanahee taan toon kookan paeh |
lines.english: But you do not appreciate the water, and so you cry out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੈ ਜਲਿ ਵਰਸਦੈ ਤਿਖ ਮਰਹਿ ਭਾਗ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੇ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: etai jal varasadai tikh mareh bhaag tinaa ke naeh |
lines.english: With so much rain, those who are die of thirst are very unfortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਿਨ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਈ ਜਿਨ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh tin sojhee pee jin vasiaa man maeh |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs understand; the Lord abides within their minds. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਥ ਜਤੀ ਸਿਧ ਪੀਰ ਕਿਨੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naath jatee sidh peer kinai ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: The Yogic Masters, celibates, Siddhas and spiritual teachers - none of them has found the limits of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੁਝੈ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam dhiaae tujhai samaaeaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs meditate on the Naam, and merge in You, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗ ਛਤੀਹ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jug chhateeh gubaar tis hee bhaaeaa |
lines.english: For thirty-six ages, God remained in utter darkness, as He pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਾ ਬਿੰਬੁ ਅਸਰਾਲੁ ਤਿਨੈ ਵਰਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jalaa binb asaraal tinai varataaeaa |
lines.english: The vast expanse of water swirled around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਵਾਦੁ ਭੁਖ ਤਿਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: agan upaaee vaad bhukh tihaaeaa |
lines.english: He formed fire and conflict, hunger and thirst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਲੁ ਅਨੀਲੁ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਸਰਜੀਤੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: neel aneel agam sarajeet sabaaeaa |
lines.english: The Creator of all is Infinite, Endless and Inaccessible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਕੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: duneea kai sir kaal doojaa bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Death hangs over the heads of the people of the world, in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਖੈ ਰਖਣਹਾਰੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੁਝਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: rakhai rakhanahaar jin sabad bujhaaeaa |9|
lines.english: The Savior Lord saves those who realize the Word of the Shabad. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ਏਨਾ ਜੰਤਾ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree sukh hoe enaa jantaa kaa dukh jaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Grace, there is peace; the pain of these creatures is gone. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਲੁ ਸਭ ਤੈ ਵਰਸਦਾ ਵਰਸੈ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jal sabh tai varasadaa varasai bhaae subhaae |
lines.english: This rain pours down on all; it rains down in accordance with God's Loving Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਬਿਰਖਾ ਹਰੀਆਵਲੇ ਜੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: se birakhaa hareeaavale jo guramukh rahe samaae |
lines.english: Those trees become green and lush, which remain immersed in the Guru's Word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਿੰਨੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਚਮਕਿਆ ਵੁਠਾ ਛਹਬਰ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhinee rain chamakiaa vutthaa chhahabar laae |
lines.english: The night is wet with dew; lightning flashes, and the rain pours down in torrents.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਵੁਠੈ ਅਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਜਾਂ ਸਹੁ ਕਰੇ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jit vutthai an dhan bahut aoopajai jaan sahu kare rajaae |
lines.english: Food and wealth are produced in abundance when it rains, if it is the Will of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਖਾਧੈ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀਐ ਜੀਆਂ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jit khaadhai man tripateeai jeean jugat samaae |
lines.english: Consuming it, the minds of His creatures are satisfied, and they adopt the lifestyle of the way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਕਾ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaaneea kaa dhan naam hai sad hee rahai samaae |
lines.english: The Naam is the wealth of the spiritually wise. It is permeating and pervading forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਕਰਤੇ ਕਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਹੈ ਕਦੇ ਆਵੈ ਕਦੇ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu dhan karate kaa khel hai kade aavai kade jaae |
lines.english: This wealth is the play of the Creator Lord. Sometimes it comes, and sometimes it goes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾਂ ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jin kau nadar kare taan ihu dhan palai paae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are blessed with His Glance of Grace receive this wealth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਹਉ ਕੈ ਸਿਉ ਕਰੀ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aap karaae kare aap hau kai siau karee pukaar |
lines.english: He Himself does, and causes all to be done. Unto whom can I complain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗਸੀ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aape lekhaa mangasee aap karaae kaar |
lines.english: He Himself calls the mortal beings to account; He Himself causes them to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਕਰੇ ਗਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so theeai hukam kare gaavaar |
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him happens. Only a fool issues commands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਸੁਣੇ ਆਪਿ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape vekhai sune aap sabhasai de aadhaar |
lines.english: He Himself sees, and He Himself hears; He gives His Support to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਛਡਾਏ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap chhaddaae chhutteeai aape bakhasanahaar |
lines.english: He Himself saves and redeems; He Himself is the Forgiver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਏਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh ek varatadaa sir sir kare beechaar |
lines.english: He alone is pervading and permeating all; He considers each and every one.
